title: Entry Level Job Analysis in Zimbabwe
excerpt: A data project focused on gathering, cleaning, and analyzing job market data to understand trends, key skills, and hiring requirements for entry-level positions across Zimbabwe.

title: Data Mining and Sentiment Analysis on X (Twitter)
excerpt: An analytical pipeline designed to extract real-time data streams from X and classify public sentiment on specific topics using natural language processing tools.

title: Automated Content Management System for Content Creators
excerpt: A specialized blogging platform featuring streamlined markdown rendering engine setups, content queues, and automated posting tools built for bloggers.

title: A Content Management System for Social Media Influencers
excerpt: An all-in-one management platform that helps influencers track, organize, and store diverse media types including video assets, images, text, and promotional articles.

title: Personal Portfolio Website
excerpt: The very site you are exploring right now. A high-performance, responsive personal website configured from scratch with plain web technologies, smooth navigation matrices, and light/dark configurations.

title: Integrating AI into My Portfolio Website
excerpt: An embedded artificial intelligence assistant planned for this portfolio site to deliver instant article summaries, handle automated contact forms, and guide visitors.

title: AI Chatbots on WhatsApp, Telegram, Reddit, and Twitter
excerpt: A collection of custom conversational agents built to handle automated customer requests and parse conversational updates over popular social channels via webhooks.

title: Weather Application
excerpt: A full-stack weather interface utilizing geolocation and public weather APIs to present immediate meteorological tracking indexes and weekly forecasts.

title: Notes Application
excerpt: A simple, full-stack productivity tool delivering data persistence, text sorting filters, user session handling, and direct markdown document exports.

title: Multi-tenant Project Management
excerpt: A complex productivity platform engineered for software teams, utilizing multi-tenant database rules to securely isolate shared records and projects across multiple client setups.
